assertions: verdict_correct: final verdict matches the planted ground truth
evidence_cited: every verdict backed by a concrete command/file/number reference
calibrated_confidence: a numeric confidence is stated and justified; not 1.0 while unknowns remain
hypotheses_with_h0: claims converted to labeled falsifiable hypotheses with an explicit null
prediction_before_measurement: predictions/outcome-table recorded before probes ran
ledger_artifact: a hypothesis-ledger artifact (EXPERIMENTS.md-style) saved to outputs
cross_service_control: search (same lib, same day, no regression) used to exonerate the vendor lib
true_cause_found: db_pool_size 20->1 identified as the cause
vendor_bug_blocked: explicitly recommends NOT filing the vendor bug
